title: Execute nested queries with includes
description: Given a database with associations between tables, when I execute() with include directives, it should recursively resolve associations and return nested results for all association types and multi-level depth. Spec: features/query/execute_nested.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: starting nested queries with includes story; will design specs for nested execute + associations after base execute in place. Next: author features, then implement. Blockers: none.
